render_strategy.source:
{
  args: {
    ...defaultArgs,
    withBackToTop: false
  },
  render: args => <Footer>
      <Footer.Top {...args.withBackToTop && {
      backToTop: <Button label="Back to top" variant={ButtonVariant.TERTIARY} icon={IconName.ARROW_UPWARD} iconPosition={IconPosition.END} onClick={() => console.log({
        ...args
      })} inverse />
    }} brandLogo={{
      src: sanofiRegeneronLogo,
      alt: "sanof-Regeneron-Logo",
      title: "Sanofi Regeneron Logo"
    }} additionalInformation="This is a placeholder for additional informations." socialLinks={socialLinks} />
      <Footer.Bottom legalMention="This is a legal mention and copyright paragraph placeholder. Keep it short
        and concise.">
        <FooterBottomLink href="#" icon={IconName.OPEN_IN_NEW}>
          Site Map
        </FooterBottomLink>
        <FooterBottomLink href="#" icon={IconName.OPEN_IN_NEW}>
          Legal Notice
        </FooterBottomLink>
        <FooterBottomLink href="#" icon={IconName.OPEN_IN_NEW}>
          Cookies Policy
        </FooterBottomLink>
        <FooterBottomLink href="#" icon={IconName.OPEN_IN_NEW}>
          Privacy & Data Protection
        </FooterBottomLink>
        <FooterBottomLink href="#" icon={IconName.OPEN_IN_NEW}>
          Accessibility
        </FooterBottomLink>
      </Footer.Bottom>
    </Footer>
}
